summary: Fill Monitor / Trade Journal and Telegram Alerts features fully tested. All backend APIs working (journal, stats, telegram status/test/toggle). Frontend /fills page loads correctly with stats grid, filter panel, position table. Position expansion shows timeline and SignalStack orders. Telegram panel shows status, toggle, and test button. Journal button in header navigates to /fills. Filters (symbol, status, period) work correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/fills/journal returns positions with orders, realized_pnl, events
✅ Backend: GET /api/fills/stats returns total_trades, win_rate, by_regime, by_symbol
✅ Backend: GET /api/fills/telegram/status returns configured:true, bot_token_set:true, chat_id_set:true, enabled:true
✅ Backend: POST /api/fills/telegram/test sends real message to Telegram (status:sent, message_id:3)
✅ Backend: POST /api/fills/telegram/toggle?enabled=true enables alerts
✅ Frontend: /fills page loads with data-testid='fill-monitor'
✅ Frontend: Trade Journal header visible
✅ Frontend: Stats grid visible with TRADES, WIN RATE, P&L TOTAL, VITORIAS, DERROTAS, AVG WIN, AVG LOSS, SS ORDERS
✅ Frontend: Symbol filter (data-testid='filter-symbol') visible and functional
✅ Frontend: Status filter (data-testid='filter-status') visible and functional
✅ Frontend: Period filter (data-testid='filter-days') visible and functional
✅ Frontend: Position table shows 16 positions with side, symbol, qty, status, archetype, regime, entry, exit, P&L, date
✅ Frontend: Clicking position row expands to show Timeline and SignalStack Orders
✅ Frontend: Timeline shows OPENED and CLOSED events with timestamps
✅ Frontend: SignalStack Orders section shows related orders with status badges
✅ Frontend: Telegram tab visible in left panel
✅ Frontend: Telegram panel (data-testid='telegram-panel') shows 'Bot configurado' status
✅ Frontend: Telegram toggle (data-testid='telegram-toggle') visible and enabled
✅ Frontend: Telegram test button (data-testid='telegram-test-btn') visible
✅ Frontend: Bot Token and Chat ID status indicators show 'configurado'
✅ Frontend: Journal button (data-testid='fills-nav-btn') in main header navigates to /fills
✅ Frontend: MNQ filter correctly shows 8 positions (filtered from 16)
✅ Frontend: CLOSED status filter shows all 16 positions (all are closed)
critical_code_review_comments: fills_router correctly registered in server.py at line 79
Telegram alerts integration at lines 6313-6314 (position opened) and 6443-6444 (position closed)
FillMonitor.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Journal endpoint correctly enriches positions with SignalStack orders
Stats endpoint correctly calculates win_rate, by_regime, by_symbol
Telegram service uses environment variables TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID from backend/.env
All paper positions have realized_pnl=0 because exit_price is not set (expected for paper_filled positions)

test_credentials.note: Used for API and Playwright tests

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing 16 paper_filled positions in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fill Monitor / Trade Journal and Telegram Alerts features fully tested. Key components: (1) Backend routes in /app/backend/routes/fills.py - journal, stats, telegram endpoints. (2) Telegram service in /app/backend/services/telegram_alerts.py - send_message, alert_position_opened, alert_position_closed, test_connection. (3) Frontend component /app/frontend/src/components/FillMonitor.jsx - StatCard, PositionRow, TelegramPanel. (4) Route /fills added in App.js line ~1087, Journal button in header line ~425. (5) Telegram bot @caiadobot configured with token and chat_id in backend/.env. (6) All 16 positions are paper_filled with state=CLOSED, regime=TRANSICAO, realized_pnl=0 (no exit_price set).

feature_verification.GET /api/fills/journal: Working - returns positions with orders, events, realized_pnl
feature_verification.GET /api/fills/stats: Working - returns total_trades=16, win_rate=0%, by_regime, by_symbol
feature_verification.POST /api/fills/telegram/test: Working - sends real message to Telegram, returns status=sent
feature_verification./fills page load: Working - shows header, stats grid, filter panel, position table
feature_verification.Journal button navigation: Working - navigates from main dashboard to /fills
feature_verification.Position row expansion: Working - shows Timeline and SignalStack Orders
feature_verification.Telegram panel: Working - shows status, toggle, test button

mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhook is MOCKED. Positions are paper_filled. Telegram test message is REAL (actually sends to @caiadobot).
